columns.name: ENHETSNR
columns.description: The unit number associated with the service agreement

columns.name: AVTALENR
columns.description: Unique identifier for the service agreement

columns.name: VERKSTED
columns.description: Identifier for the workshop where the service is performed

columns.name: KOMMENTAR
columns.description: Additional remarks or comments related to the service agreement

columns.name: FK_OPPF
columns.description: Code representing an opportunity associated with the service agreement

columns.name: BRUKERID
columns.description: Identifier for the user who created or updated the service agreement

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: The timestamp when the record was created or last modified

columns.name: SERVICE_DATO
columns.description: The date of service provided under the agreement

columns.name: SLUTT_DATO
columns.description: The end date of the service agreement

columns.name: SERVICEMND
columns.description: The month when the service is provided (e.g., '01' for January)

columns.name: PRIS_FORSTE
columns.description: The initial price charged for the first unit of service

columns.name: PRIS_RESTEN
columns.description: The price charged for subsequent units of service

columns.name: JORDBRUK
columns.description: Indicator of whether the service is used in agriculture (1 = yes, 0 = no)

columns.name: ANLEGG
columns.description: Indicator of whether the service is used in installations (1 = yes, 0 = no)

columns.name: SKOGBRUK
columns.description: Indicator of whether the service is used in forestry (1 = yes, 0 = no)
